parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: '2.0', method: 'call', params: { service: 'common', method: 'authenticate', args: [$('Config & Extract Ticket').item.json.odoo_db, $('Config & Extract Ticket').item.json.odoo_username, $('Config & Extract Ticket').item.json.odoo_api_key, {}] }, id: 1 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: '2.0', method: 'call', params: { service: 'object', method: 'execute_kw', args: [ $('Config & Extract Ticket').item.json.odoo_db, $('Odoo Authenticate').item.json.result, $('Config & Extract Ticket').item.json.odoo_api_key, 'res.partner', 'search_read', [[['email', '=', $('Config & Extract Ticket').item.json.customer_email]]], { fields: ['id', 'name', 'email'], limit: 1 } ] }, id: 2 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: '2.0', method: 'call', params: { service: 'object', method: 'execute_kw', args: [ $('Config & Extract Ticket').item.json.odoo_db, $('Odoo Authenticate').item.json.result, $('Config & Extract Ticket').item.json.odoo_api_key, 'crm.lead', 'create', [{ name: '[Zammad #' + $('Config & Extract Ticket').item.json.ticket_number + '] ' + $('Config & Extract Ticket').item.json.title, contact_name: $('Config & Extract Ticket').item.json.customer_name, email_from: $('Config & Extract Ticket').item.json.customer_email, partner_id: ($json.result && $json.result.length > 0) ? $json.result[0].id : false, description: 'Support ticket from Zammad

Ticket: #' + $('Config & Extract Ticket').item.json.ticket_number + '
Priority: ' + $('Config & Extract Ticket').item.json.priority + '
Group: ' + $('Config & Extract Ticket').item.json.group + '

View: ' + $('Config & Extract Ticket').item.json.zammad_url, type: 'opportunity' }], { context: { mail_create_nosubscribe: true, mail_create_nolog: true, mail_notrack: true, tracking_disable: true } } ] }, id: 3 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: '2.0', method: 'call', params: { service: 'object', method: 'execute_kw', args: [ $('Config & Extract Ticket').item.json.odoo_db, $('Odoo Authenticate').item.json.result, $('Config & Extract Ticket').item.json.odoo_api_key, 'crm.lead', 'message_post', [$json.result], { body: '
